key.name: sort
key.description: Sort the folder by name, EXIF capture time, or size.

key.name: wrap
key.description: Wrap prev/next at the first/last image.

key.name: background
key.description: Background behind the image in large view.

key.name: scroll-behavior
key.description: What the mouse scroll wheel does in large view.

key.name: slideshow-delay
key.description: Seconds between slides in slideshow mode.

key.name: thumbnail-size
key.description: Pixel size of grid thumbnails (resizable via +/-).

key.name: hide-trashed
key.description: Hide ./Trash/deleted items from the grid entirely.

key.name: hide-raw-sidecars
key.description: Hide RAW files (.RAF/.CR3/.NEF/...) when a JPEG with the same stem exists (toggle to reveal).

key.name: window-geometry
key.description: (width, height, fullscreen, maximized) restored on launch.

key.name: destinations
key.description: Ordered (name, path) pairs for the `m` move popup; order = hotkey order.

key.name: editors
key.description: Ordered (name, command) pairs for the `e` open-in popup; %f = current file.

key.name: scripts
key.description: Ordered (name, command) pairs for the `!` run-script popup; %f/%d expanded, run via /bin/sh -c.

key.name: enhance-presets
key.description: Ordered (name, gegl-graph) pairs for the `a` enhance popup (GEGL only).
